pi_items.source: Verified by inspecting setup_task.sh which explicitly creates these exact bindings and roles via kubectl apply commands.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically injected Kubernetes RBAC violations. It has been verified that the four expected violations ('dev-all-access' ClusterRoleBinding, 'wildcard-staging-role' Role, 'monitoring-cluster-admin' ClusterRoleBinding, and 'ci-elevated-access' RoleBinding) are directly created via kubectl commands in setup_task.sh. The targeted namespaces are confirmed to be 'development', 'staging', and 'monitoring', and the verifier strictly requires a score of 70 (3 out of 4 violations remediated) to pass.
